todos.content: Phase 1: Quick Wins - Status bar, cursors, layer commands, screen modes, tool options
Phase 2: Panel Completion - Glyphs, Notes, Library, Discover, Learn, Styles, Navigator, Info, Histogram, Preset Manager, Home Screen
Phase 3: Typography Depth - Variable fonts, OpenType, font preview, char/para styles, match font
Phase 4: Layer/Compositing - Layer filtering, knockout, mask hides effects, layer comps, save/load selection, channel calculations, apply image
Phase 5: Core Tool Completion - Bezier multi-anchor, slice export, content-aware fill workspace, transform selection
Phase 6: Filter/Color Completion - Duotone, bitmap, indexed color, filter gallery combos
Phase 7: Video Timeline - Frame-accurate editing, transitions, audio mixer, animation export
Phase 8: Performance - Progressive preview, dirty-rect, memory budget, offscreen canvas, canvas pooling, RAF coalescer, autosave, tiled backing store, large docs
Phase 9: Production/Export - TIFF compressed, metadata, multi-page PDF import, ICC UI, print dialog, image processor
Phase 10: Automation/Workflow - Variables UI, conditional actions, keyboard shortcut editor, menu customization, photomerge, PDF presentation
Phase 11: Remaining items - Split/merge channels, custom shape library, stroke path, color picker HUD, export limitation report, misc commands
